channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Apple reportedly orders 10M foldable iPhone Ultra models, which could sell for around $2500 - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Apple reportedly orders 10M foldable iPhone Ultra models, which could sell for around $2500  9to5Mac
  2. Apple Ramps Foldable iPhone 'Ultra' Production to 10 Million Units  MacRumors
  3. Apple's first-ever foldable iPhone is as popular as the plague, as it turns out  PhoneArena
  4. Apple reportedly wants to sell 10 million foldable iPhones, but the starting price could give you serious sticker shock  Digital Trends
  5. Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide vs iPhone Fold: Which Would You Pick?  ThinBorne

item.title: Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims  TechCrunch
  2. Apple ‘Hide My Email’ Vulnerability Reveals Peoples’ Real Email Addresses  404 Media
  3. Apple's Hide My Email May Not Be Hiding Anything  Engadget
  4. Major Apple Bug Appears to Disclose All Real Emails for 'Hide My Email' Users  cnet.com
  5. Apple hasn't fixed a Hide My Email privacy bug in over a year  AppleInsider

item.title: Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection  The Verge
  3. Xbox reportedly testing a way to digitize physical games in the wake of PlayStation killing game discs — feature said to go back to Xbox One-era games  Tom's Hardware
  4. New details emerge on Xbox 'Positron', Microsoft's disc-to-digital program — as it seems likely Xbox Helix will drop discs too  Windows Central
  5. Xbox may allow gamers to digitize their physical game collection  Mashable
